lens: Morgan Stanley caps a strong bank-earnings run with record Q2 revenue and profit on dealmaking and equities trading, following Goldman (+9% on the print) and JPMorgan (+2.5%). The tape firmed (S&P +0.4%, Nasdaq +0.6%). Under it, fresh deal flow is dense and multi-bank: ePointZero's completed $2.25B all-cash buy of Traverse Midstream (JPMorgan buy-side; Evercore and Greenhill sell-side), plus this week's filed proxies — Apogee/AbbVie ($135.11/sh; Goldman, Jefferies), AvalonBay/Equity Residential, and Olin/Huntsman.

stories.headline: Morgan Stanley posts record Q2 revenue and profit on dealmaking and equities trading
stories.why_it_matters: Morgan Stanley reported record Q2 2026 revenue and profit, beating Wall Street estimates, with equities trading and dealmaking driving the beat — the last of the three big banks (after Goldman and JPMorgan) to report this cycle. Record advisory/markets results signal active pipelines, the backdrop for deal-process and diligence demand. (Shares were roughly flat intraday as the beat was largely expected.)
stories.suggested_action: Use the MS record quarter as a pipeline-confidence hook with advisory coverage teams — strong dealmaking revenue means live processes that need secure diligence infrastructure.

deal_clock.event: Morgan Stanley reports record Q2 revenue & profit

stories.headline: Stocks firm as bank earnings wrap: S&P +0.4%, Nasdaq +0.6%, Dow +0.2%
stories.why_it_matters: US equities rose as the big-bank earnings cycle closed out constructively — S&P 500 +0.39% (7,573.17), Nasdaq +0.59% (26,261.53), Dow +0.23% (52,629.43). Goldman (+9% on its print) and JPMorgan (+2.5%) led financials higher this week, a market vote of confidence in capital-markets momentum.
stories.suggested_action: Frame the week as the market re-rating advisory franchises on deal-flow expectations — a natural lead-in to pipeline conversations post-earnings.

stories.headline: JPMorgan advises ePointZero on its completed $2.25B all-cash buy of Traverse Midstream
stories.why_it_matters: ePointZero (a 2PointZero/Abu Dhabi group) completed a $2.25B all-cash acquisition of Traverse Midstream Partners — owner of 35% of the Rover Pipeline and 25% of the Ohio River System — from The Energy & Minerals Group. J.P. Morgan Securities advised the buyer (ePointZero); Santander and Mizuho provided committed financing. A cross-border energy-infrastructure deal of scale with heavy financing and diligence workstreams.
stories.suggested_action: Reach out to JPMorgan's energy/infrastructure coverage on the Traverse Midstream close — a $2.25B cross-border deal with committed financing is a strong diligence/data-room use case.

deal_clock.event: ePointZero completes $2.25B acquisition of Traverse Midstream

stories.headline: Evercore advises Traverse Midstream on its $2.25B all-cash sale to ePointZero
stories.why_it_matters: On the sell-side of the completed $2.25B Traverse Midstream deal, Evercore served as financial adviser to Traverse (with Greenhill as co-adviser), representing The Energy & Minerals Group. A large energy-infrastructure sell-side with multiple advisers and cross-border financing.
stories.suggested_action: Engage Evercore's energy coverage on the Traverse Midstream sale — a completed $2.25B infrastructure deal is a concrete reason to talk diligence access across the adviser group.

deal_clock.event: Traverse Midstream sold to ePointZero for $2.25B

stories.headline: Greenhill co-advises Traverse Midstream on its $2.25B sale to ePointZero
stories.why_it_matters: Greenhill & Co (a Mizuho affiliate) served as co-financial adviser to Traverse Midstream on its completed $2.25B all-cash sale to ePointZero, alongside Evercore. A large cross-border energy-infrastructure sell-side mandate.
stories.suggested_action: Talk to Greenhill on the Traverse Midstream sale — a completed multi-adviser infrastructure deal is a live diligence use case.

deal_clock.event: Traverse Midstream $2.25B sale completed; Greenhill co-adviser

stories.headline: Goldman and Jefferies advise Apogee on AbbVie's $135.11/share cash acquisition
stories.why_it_matters: Apogee Therapeutics (NASDAQ: APGE) filed its definitive merger proxy for an all-cash acquisition by AbbVie at $135.11 per share. Goldman Sachs and Jefferies are Apogee's financial advisers. A large-cap biopharma take-private with a filed DEFM14A — a document-heavy, time-sensitive diligence process now in the shareholder-vote phase.
stories.suggested_action: Reach out to Goldman's healthcare coverage on Apogee/AbbVie — an all-cash biopharma take-private with a filed proxy is a clean, current diligence use case.

deal_clock.event: Apogee definitive merger proxy filed; $135.11/sh cash

stories.headline: AvalonBay–Equity Residential all-stock REIT merger proxy filed (2.793 EQR per AVB share)
stories.why_it_matters: AvalonBay Communities (NYSE: AVB) filed a joint proxy for an all-stock merger with Equity Residential — each AVB share converts to 2.793 EQR shares (fixed ratio), one of the largest US apartment REIT combinations. Goldman Sachs and Morgan Stanley advise on the deal; Wells Fargo and Centerview advise the counterparties. A mega-cap REIT merger with a heavy integration/diligence workflow.
stories.suggested_action: Talk to Goldman's real estate coverage on AvalonBay/Equity Residential — a mega-cap all-stock REIT merger with a filed proxy is a high-value data-room use case.

stories.headline: Citi and Lazard advise Huntsman on its all-stock merger with Olin (0.5476 ratio)
stories.why_it_matters: Huntsman (NYSE: HUN) filed a joint merger proxy for an all-stock combination with Olin — each Huntsman share converts to 0.5476 Olin shares. Citi and Lazard advise Huntsman (Morgan Stanley and BofA also named in the filing). A large chemicals merger-of-scale with a filed DEFM14A and active diligence.
stories.suggested_action: Engage Citi's chemicals/industrials coverage on Olin/Huntsman — a filed all-stock merger means diligence workstreams are active.

stories.headline: Jefferies advises Genco as its board again urges rejection of Diana's $24.80 tender
stories.why_it_matters: Genco Shipping & Trading (NYSE: GNK) issued an updated statement (Jul 13) urging shareholders not to tender into Diana Shipping's extended $24.80/share cash tender offer, calling it inadequate and below NAV. Jefferies is Genco's financial adviser; Morgan Stanley is special adviser to the board. A live contested tender defense — the most access-sensitive kind of process.
stories.suggested_action: Reach out to Jefferies on the Genco defense — a contested, extended tender is a high-stakes, access-sensitive diligence situation.

deal_clock.event: Genco board first rejects Diana's $24.80 tender

opportunities.headline: Adviser to Apogee on AbbVie's $135.11/share cash acquisition
opportunities.why_it_matters: Goldman (with Jefferies) advises Apogee Therapeutics on AbbVie's $135.11/sh all-cash take-private. Definitive proxy filed Jul 13 — the vote and diligence phase is live in a large-cap biopharma deal.
opportunities.outreach_idea: Open on Apogee/AbbVie — a filed large-cap biopharma take-private is a concrete reason to engage Goldman's healthcare team.

outreach_draft.subject: Apogee / AbbVie — supporting a large-cap take-private
outreach_draft.body:
Congratulations on Goldman's role advising Apogee Therapeutics on the AbbVie acquisition. All-cash biopharma take-privates run heavy, time-sensitive diligence through the shareholder vote — would welcome a conversation on how we support secure, auditable data-room access to close.

opportunities.why_it_matters: Announced today: Evercore advises First Hawaiian on an all-stock buy of TriCo Bancshares (~$63.12/sh). A freshly signed public bank merger triggers two-sided diligence and integration planning immediately.
opportunities.outreach_idea: Open on the First Hawaiian/TriCo announcement — a same-day bank merger is a concrete reason to engage Evercore's FIG team on diligence infrastructure.

opportunities.headline: Adviser to IHS Holding board on MTN's $8.50/share cash take-private
opportunities.why_it_matters: JPMorgan advises the IHS Holding board on MTN Group's $8.50/sh cash take-private, funded partly by a $1.0B term loan. Tender/merger materials filed Jul 10 — a document-heavy, cross-border process in motion.
opportunities.outreach_idea: Engage JPMorgan's telecom-infrastructure coverage on IHS — a cross-border cash take-private with financing is a strong diligence use case.

market_snapshot.macro_note: Big-bank earnings wrapped constructively — MS record Q2 (today), after GS (+9%) and JPM (+2.5%) prints. Indices intraday ~9:45 AM EDT Jul 15; GS/JPM shown at prior close (earnings-day moves). Treasury-yield, VIX and boutique-bank quotes omitted where only stale data was verifiable — accuracy over completeness.

talking_point.quote: The big three all printed strong quarters — Goldman up 9% on record banking and markets, and now Morgan Stanley with record revenue on dealmaking. The market is paying up for deal-flow momentum. With this week's filings — Apogee/AbbVie, AvalonBay/Equity Residential, the $2.25B Traverse Midstream close — how are you framing second-half pipeline?
talking_point.use_with: M&A and advisory coverage teams (esp. Morgan Stanley, Goldman, JPMorgan, Evercore, Jefferies)
talking_point.context: Anchors on the completed bank-earnings run — MS record Q2 today, GS +9% and JPM +2.5% this week — tied to a dense filing/deal record (Apogee, AvalonBay, Huntsman, Traverse Midstream). A natural post-earnings hook on H2 pipeline confidence and relaunching processes, the moment room infrastructure gets revisited.

ranked.read: Earnings run wrapped strong — MS record Q2 today; GS +9% and JPM +2.5% this week reinforce capital-markets momentum.
ePointZero's $2.25B all-cash buy of Traverse Midstream (JPMorgan buy-side; Evercore, Greenhill sell-side) — a cross-border infrastructure deal of scale.
AbbVie's $135.11/sh cash buy of Apogee (Goldman, Jefferies) headlines large-cap biopharma take-private activity.
AvalonBay/Equity Residential all-stock merger (Goldman, Morgan Stanley; Wells Fargo, Centerview) — a mega-cap apartment REIT combination.

pipeline_watch.note: Named covered-bank mandates and sector heat. Rumored / no-adviser situations live in the Rumor Mill.

skeptics_corner.note: Unconfirmed leads — rumored deals and situations with no adviser named yet (or advisers unconfirmed). Real reporting, but treat as speculative: chase them, don't quote them on a call.

items.lead: Received an unsolicited ~$53B buyout proposal ($60.50/share) from Stripe and Advent International, who would jointly own it 50/50; all parties declined to comment.
items.why_unverified: Reported takeover proposal; no financial advisers disclosed. A massive potential mandate up for grabs — reach out early.

items.lead: O'Reilly Automotive has reportedly made a cash bid of $10B+ for GPC's automotive (NAPA) division, which GPC had planned to spin off — a rival move to the planned tax-free spinoff.
items.why_unverified: Reported bid; JPMorgan and Guggenheim were hired for the spinoff, not confirmed on the O'Reilly bid. Situation in flux.
items.source_note: Yahoo Finance / The Auto Wire (citing Bloomberg), Jul 11 2026

items.lead: Exploring a sale; has attracted takeover interest from France's Bolloré Group (backing Canal+) and Banijay Group — a deal is uncertain and it could remain independent.
items.why_unverified: Article says an unnamed investment bank is helping evaluate approaches; no adviser confirmed and no deal certain.

items.lead: Launched a formal sale process inviting expressions of interest for the entire share capital, after trading at a discount to NAV; board says it is not yet in active discussions with any bidder.
items.why_unverified: Formally announced sale process (firmer than a rumor) but no buyer or sell-side adviser confirmed yet — a legitimate chase.
items.source_note: Proactive via Yahoo Finance UK, Jul 15 2026
